sections.paragraph:
ἀμελής, ές careless, negligent (so Aristoph., X., Pla. et al.; Epict. 2, 6, 2; Plut., Mor. 34d; 64f; PGiss 79 II, 9; Jos., Ant. 11, 20) οὐχ εὑρεθήσομαι ἀ. Hs 8, 2, 7; κἀγὼ ἀ. δόξω εἶναι 9, 7, 6.—DELG s.v. μέλω.

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

et et al. = et alii (and others)

Epict Epict , various works, I–II a.d.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

PGiss PGiss = Griechische Papyri . . . zu Giessen—List 4

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Hs Hs = Similitudes

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 52
